mapper.select: /** UsptAcdmcrDao.selectList */ select acdmcr_id , member_id , bgnde , endde , schul_nm , major , grdtn_div_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('GRDTN_DIV', grdtn_div_cd) as grdtn_div , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt , row_number() over (order by bgnde, created_dt) as rn from uspt_acdmcr where member_id = #{memberId}
